notes: Two clear behavioral clusters: (1) code-extraction responses (12/15) all share three systematic OCR errors — missing trailing underscore on validatePlaylistKeys_, dropped 'd' in aujourd'hui (except t0.7|rep1 which gets it right), and the 500 misplaced into Combiner.push instead of rateLimitedForEach. (2) Three responses (t0.4|rep2, t0.7|rep0, t0.7|rep2) went completely off-task and fabricated HTML/CSS mock-ups of the editor UI instead of the code, all truncated — scored 0 as severe hallucination. Temperature 0.7 is the only setting that produced both the best single extraction (rep1) and the most off-task failures. The hardest discriminator (escaped-apostrophe aujourd'hui string) was correctly captured only once.
